title: entada praetermissa
intro: Entada praetermissa, also known as the African coral tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The seeds of the Entada praetermissa plant are said to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making them beneficial for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Entada praetermissa, such as teas and infusions, are often used to promote digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
